mapper.select: SELECT AGENT_ID, NVL(FN_GET_ORGNM(AGENT_ID), '') AGENT_NM, NVL(DEPOSIT, 0) DEPOSIT, NVL(VIR_ACCOUNT_ID, '') VIR_ACCOUNT_ID, NVL(F_GET_VAC_BANK_NAME(VIR_ACCOUNT_ID),'') VIR_BANK_NM FROM PPS_AGENT A WHERE AGENT_ID = #{agentId}

SELECT BATCH_SEQ, REQ_TYPE, REQ_CNT, AMOUNT, RECHARGE_INFO, TITLE, REC_DT, ADMIN_ID, ADMIN_NM, LAST_BATCH_DT, DELAY_CNT, SUCC_CNT, FAIL_CNT FROM( SELECT /*+ INDEX_DESC(A PPS_RCG_BATCH_IDX) */ BATCH_SEQ, REQ_TYPE, REQ_CNT, AMOUNT, RECHARGE_INFO, TITLE, TO_CHAR(REC_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') REC_DT, ADMIN_ID, F_GET_ADMIN_NM(ADMIN_ID) ADMIN_NM, TO_CHAR(LAST_BATCH_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') LAST_BATCH_DT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PPS_RCG_REMOTE_REQ WHERE BATCH_SEQ = A.BATCH_SEQ) DELAY_CNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PPS_RCG_REMOTE_REQ_LOG WHERE BATCH_SEQ = A.BATCH_SEQ AND RECORD_DATE >= TRUNC(A.REC_DT) AND IN_REQ_CD = '0000' AND IN_RES_CD = '0000') SUCC_CNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PPS_RCG_REMOTE_REQ_LOG WHERE BATCH_SEQ = A.BATCH_SEQ AND RECORD_DATE >= TRUNC(A.REC_DT) AND (IN_REQ_CD <> '0000' OR (IN_RES_CD <> '0000' AND IN_RES_CD IS NOT NULL)) ) FAIL_CNT FROM PPS_RCG_BATCH A WHERE REC_DT > TO_DATE('20100101', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND ADMIN_ID = #{searchNm}
AND REC_DT >= TO_DATE(#{startDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND REC_DT < TO_DATE(#{endDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')+1
) WHERE 1=1
AND SUCC_CNT = REQ_CNT
AND FAIL_CNT > 0
AND DELAY_CNT = 0
AND DELAY_CNT > 0

SELECT NVL(BATCH_SEQ, 0) BATCHSEQ, NVL(REQ_TYPE, '-') REQTYPE, NVL(REQ_CNT, 0) REQCNT, NVL(AMOUNT, 0) AMOUNT, NVL(RECHARGE_INFO, '-') RECHARGEINFO, NVL(TITLE, '-') TITLE, NVL(REC_DT, '-') RECDT, NVL(ADMIN_ID, '-') ADMINID, NVL(ADMIN_NM, '-') ADMINNM, NVL(LAST_BATCH_DT, '-') LASTBATCHDT, DELAY_CNT DELAYCNT, SUCC_CNT SUCCCNT, FAIL_CNT FAILCNT FROM( SELECT /*+ INDEX_DESC(A PPS_RCG_BATCH_IDX) */ BATCH_SEQ, REQ_TYPE, REQ_CNT, AMOUNT, RECHARGE_INFO, TITLE, TO_CHAR(REC_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') REC_DT, ADMIN_ID, F_GET_ADMIN_NM(ADMIN_ID) ADMIN_NM, TO_CHAR(LAST_BATCH_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') LAST_BATCH_DT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PPS_RCG_REMOTE_REQ WHERE BATCH_SEQ = A.BATCH_SEQ) DELAY_CNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PPS_RCG_REMOTE_REQ_LOG WHERE BATCH_SEQ = A.BATCH_SEQ AND RECORD_DATE >= TRUNC(A.REC_DT) AND IN_REQ_CD = '0000' AND IN_RES_CD = '0000') SUCC_CNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PPS_RCG_REMOTE_REQ_LOG WHERE BATCH_SEQ = A.BATCH_SEQ AND RECORD_DATE >= TRUNC(A.REC_DT) AND (IN_REQ_CD <> '0000' OR (IN_RES_CD <> '0000' AND IN_RES_CD IS NOT NULL)) ) FAIL_CNT FROM PPS_RCG_BATCH A WHERE REC_DT > TO_DATE('20100101', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND ADMIN_ID = #{searchNm}
AND REC_DT >= TO_DATE(#{startDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND REC_DT < TO_DATE(#{endDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')+1
) WHERE 1=1
AND SUCC_CNT = REQ_CNT
AND FAIL_CNT > 0
AND DELAY_CNT = 0
AND DELAY_CNT > 0
